action_set_definitions.name: get_subject_property_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the initial configuration and current state of the target property from the environment.

address.description: The street address of the property.

action_set_definitions.name: get_market_economic_data
action_set_definitions.description: Fetches local market indicators, including construction costs, rental rates, and capitalization rates required for financial modeling.

location.description: The neighborhood or city area for market benchmarking.

asset_types.description: Types of property to get data for (e.g., 'warehouse', 'office', 'multifamily').

action_set_definitions.name: calculate_parking_feasibility
action_set_definitions.description: Evaluates if a specific building size and parking type can physically fit on the lot and calculates the total parking costs.

action_set_definitions.name: calculate_valuation_metric
action_set_definitions.description: Computes either Income Capitalization for current use or Residual Land Value (RLV) for redevelopment.

financial_inputs.description: Map of numerical inputs like NOI, Cap Rate, GBA, or Total Costs.

action_set_definitions.name: update_internal_valuation_state
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the world model's internal state with the progress and the final valuation findings.

state_description.target_property: Details of the specific property being valued, including address, square footage, and condition.
state_description.comparable_pool: A list of similar properties identified in the local market to be used for price comparison.
state_description.market_conditions: Current economic indicators for the local area, such as average days on market or inventory levels.
state_description.valuation_progress: The current stage of the assessment workflow (e.g., 'DATA_COLLECTION', 'ADJUSTMENT_PHASE', 'FINAL_REPORT').
state_description.internal_valuation_estimate: The current calculated value based on existing data points; updated as the Agent refines the model.
